question: How do I configure package codes in OPERA PMS?

candidates.title: Source Codes
candidates.heading: Source Codes
candidates.text: Just like market codes, source codes are attached to reservation records in order to track how reservations come to the property. All source codes can be distributed to external systems.

candidates.title: Package Codes
candidates.heading: Package Codes
candidates.text: Package setup involves defining package elements, or codes, and collecting these elements into groups, or packages. Each package code is set up separately before the package group is attached to a rate code or reservation.

candidates.title: Reservation Codes
candidates.heading: Reservation Codes
candidates.text: Configure reservation codes used by booking workflows and reservation reporting.

question: How do I configure market codes in OPERA PMS?

candidates.title: Source Codes
candidates.heading: Source Codes
candidates.text: Source codes identify where business comes from and support reporting.

candidates.title: Market Codes
candidates.heading: Market Codes
candidates.text: Market codes classify business for reporting and analysis. They are required on reservation records and can be grouped for reporting workflows.

candidates.title: Origin Codes
candidates.heading: Origin Codes
candidates.text: Origin codes identify how a booking originated and support operational reporting.

candidates.title: Source Codes
candidates.heading: Source Codes
candidates.text: Source codes are used to track where reservations and business come from, such as mail, telephone, fax, central reservations, or travel agency. They are grouped into source groups for reporting.

question: How do I configure transaction codes?

candidates.title: Back Office Interface Setup
candidates.heading: Transaction Codes Configuration
candidates.text: Configure transaction codes for a back office interface. Map exported financial activity to external accounting systems and vendor interface files.

candidates.title: About Transaction Codes Setup
candidates.heading: About Transaction Codes Setup
candidates.text: For flexible, customized configuration and efficient management reporting and administration, transaction codes are grouped into transaction groups and transaction subgroups. Transaction codes sort financial transactions and support posting setup.

candidates.title: Transaction Codes
candidates.heading: Transaction Codes
candidates.text: Transaction codes define financial posting categories and can be configured for transaction setup and reporting.
